response.global_analysis: The Reference JSON did not provide lyrics for 'Kamisama no Hanabira' by ReGLOSS. I have manually transcribed and translated the song and subsequent MC segments based on clear audio and on-screen cues. All timestamps are tightly synchronized with the vocal audio, including splitting phrases where pauses occur. On-screen character names during the intro have also been included as per the secondary priority.

subtitles.original: 音乃瀬奏
subtitles.english: Otonose Kanade

subtitles.original: 一条莉々華
subtitles.english: Ichijou Ririka

subtitles.original: 儒烏風亭らでん
subtitles.english: Juufuutei Raden

subtitles.original: 轟はじめ
subtitles.english: Todoroki Hajime

subtitles.original: 神様の花びらを
subtitles.english: The petals of God

subtitles.original: ある人は美しくと呟いた
subtitles.english: Someone murmured they were beautiful

subtitles.original: この地球の横顔は
subtitles.english: The profile of this Earth...

subtitles.original: どう見えてる？君の世界では
subtitles.english: how does it look in your world?

subtitles.original: 現実を逆さまにして
subtitles.english: Turning reality upside down,

subtitles.original: 亡くしそうなものだけ振り落とした
subtitles.english: shaking off only the things I'm about to lose.

subtitles.original: 手のひらで拾い上げようとしたら
subtitles.english: When I tried to pick them up in my palm,

subtitles.original: 指の隙間すり抜け消えてった
subtitles.english: they slipped through my fingers and disappeared.

subtitles.original: 形あるものだけが全てじゃないけど
subtitles.english: It's not that only things with form are everything, but...

subtitles.original: 形あるものがどうしても欲しいよ
subtitles.english: I still want something with form no matter what.

subtitles.original: この世界を
subtitles.english: This world...

subtitles.original: 変えることはきっと出来ないけど
subtitles.english: I surely can't change it, but...

subtitles.original: 君の中の世界なら変えられるはず
subtitles.english: in the world inside you, it should be changeable.

subtitles.original: 芽吹いて咲いて実って晴れて
subtitles.english: Sprouting, blooming, bearing fruit, and clearing up,

subtitles.original: 何一つ欠かせないから
subtitles.english: because not a single thing can be missing.

subtitles.original: 最後に君が笑ってくれれば
subtitles.english: If you smile at the end,

subtitles.original: もうそれだけでいい
subtitles.english: that's enough for me.

subtitles.original: 言葉の綾を紡ぐ人
subtitles.english: Those who spin figures of speech,

subtitles.original: 優しさを編む人
subtitles.english: those who weave kindness,

subtitles.original: それぞれの正義を分かち合えたら
subtitles.english: if we could share our respective justice...

subtitles.original: あらばまた矛盾と辻褄合わせ
subtitles.english: Then there's contradictions and consistency again,

subtitles.original: そんな刹那を抱え今日を生きる
subtitles.english: holding such moments, we live today.

subtitles.original: 分け合った灯火
subtitles.english: The light we shared,

subtitles.original: 隣から隣へ繋がって一つに
subtitles.english: connecting from neighbor to neighbor into one.

subtitles.original: 夜の帳へ息を吹き込んだ
subtitles.english: Breathed life into the veil of night,

subtitles.original: 君じゃなきゃダメなんだ
subtitles.english: it has to be you.

subtitles.original: このまま寝てしまうには勿体ないほど
subtitles.english: So much that it's a waste to just sleep like this,

subtitles.original: 優しさに包まった夜だった
subtitles.english: it was a night wrapped in kindness.

subtitles.original: はっきり浮かび上がった夢の輪郭
subtitles.english: The clearly emerging outline of a dream,

subtitles.original: それは確かに愛だった
subtitles.english: that was certainly love.

subtitles.original: 月が見守る今夜、一瞬を捕まえて
subtitles.english: Tonight watched by the moon, catch the moment,

subtitles.original: 煌めく星
subtitles.english: twinkling stars.

subtitles.original: 彩りや形、温度や響き
subtitles.english: Colors, shapes, temperature, and resonance,

subtitles.original: まるで何もかも違う僕らだけど
subtitles.english: though we are all completely different,

subtitles.original: きっと最後に歩幅で繋がって
subtitles.english: surely at the end, we'll connect by our pace.

subtitles.original: この世界を
subtitles.english: This world...

subtitles.original: 変えることはきっと出来ないけど
subtitles.english: I surely can't change it, but...

subtitles.original: 君の中の世界なら変えられるはず
subtitles.english: in the world inside you, it should be changeable.

subtitles.original: 芽吹いて咲いて実って晴れて
subtitles.english: Sprouting, blooming, bearing fruit, and clearing up,

subtitles.original: 何一つ欠かせないから
subtitles.english: because not a single thing can be missing.

subtitles.original: 最後に君が笑ってくれれば
subtitles.english: If you smile at the end,

subtitles.original: もうそれだけでいい
subtitles.english: that's enough for me.

subtitles.original: みんな聞いてくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you everyone for listening!

subtitles.original: 楽しんでくれましたかー！？
subtitles.english: Did you all have fun!?

subtitles.original: ステージ4、まだまだ続きます！
subtitles.english: Stage 4 is still continuing!

subtitles.original: 盛り上がっていきましょー！
subtitles.english: Let's get fired up!

subtitles.original: ただいまー！
subtitles.english: We're back!

subtitles.original: 7th fes ステージ4、始まりましたー！
subtitles.english: 7th Fes Stage 4 has begun!

subtitles.original: EXPOもフェスも最終日だよ！まだまだいけるよねー！？
subtitles.english: It's the final day for the EXPO and Fes! You're still with us, right!?

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、今歌って踊ったばかりで、疲れてなーい！です！
subtitles.english: I just finished singing and dancing, but I'm NOT tired at all!

subtitles.original: まだまだ元気もりもりあります！
subtitles.english: I'm still full of energy!

subtitles.original: すごい元気だね！
subtitles.english: You're so energetic!

subtitles.original: でもこんなにさ、たくさんの声援を浴びたらさ、パワーもらっちゃうよね！
subtitles.english: But when you receive this much cheering, it really gives you power!

subtitles.original: 本当にさ！でもまだまだステージは続いていきますので、皆さん
subtitles.english: Exactly! But the stage is still continuing, everyone...

subtitles.original: 右肩上がりで、もっとでかい声...
subtitles.english: Let's keep ramping up with even louder voices...
